mapper.select: SELECT H.REF_NO AS WORKORDNO, MAX(ISNULL(H.REMARK, '')) AS WORKLOTNO, MAX(W.PROCESSCD) AS PROCESSCD, MAX(S.PARTNO) AS MAT_PARTNO, MAX(G.PARTNM) AS MAT_PARTNM, H.LOTNO AS MAT_LOTNO, SUM(H.QTY) * -1 AS INPUT_QTY, MAX(G.UNIT) AS UNIT FROM TBL_PROD_STOCK_HISTORY H LEFT JOIN TBL_PROD_LOTSTATE S ON H.LOTNO = S.LOTNO LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON S.PARTNO = G.PARTNO LEFT JOIN TBL_PROD_WORKORDER W ON H.REF_NO = W.WORKORDNO WHERE H.REF_NO = #{WORKORDNO} AND H.STOCKCHANGEGUBUN IN ('투입', '소모', '투입취소', '생산취소_복원') GROUP BY H.REF_NO, H.LOTNO HAVING SUM(H.QTY) < 0 ORDER BY MAX(H.CHANGEDAY) DESC, MAX(H.STOCKHISTORYNO) DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PROD_STOCK_HISTORY ( LOTNO, LOCATIONCODE, STOCKHISTORYNO, QTY, STOCKCHANGEGUBUN, CHANGEDAY, REMARK, REF_NO, REGUSERID, REGDTM ) VALUES ( #{MAT_LOTNO}, #{LOCATIONCODE}, #{STOCKHISTORYNO}, #{INPUT_QTY} * -1, '투입', CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), GETDATE(), 23), #{REMARK}, #{WORKORDNO}, 1, GETDATE() )

INSERT INTO TBL_PROD_STOCK_HISTORY ( LOTNO, LOCATIONCODE, STOCKHISTORYNO, QTY, STOCKCHANGEGUBUN, CHANGEDAY, REMARK, REF_NO, REGUSERID, REGDTM ) VALUES ( #{MAT_LOTNO}, #{LOCATIONCODE}, #{STOCKHISTORYNO}, #{INPUT_QTY}, '투입취소', CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), GETDATE(), 23), '투입취소', #{WORKORDNO}, 1, GETDATE() )
